objective: Objectif de stratégie de trading cryptographique: [Momentum] sur WIFUSDC 5m. Indicateurs : EMA + OBV + ROC + ATR. Entrées : [EMA(10) > EMA(20), OBV positive, ROC>0]. Sorties : LONG (long position). Risk management : SL = 8%, TP = 16%. Hypothèse testable et falsifiable: la combinaison d'indicateurs de tendance rapide avec des indicateurs de volume offrant une meilleure prise en charge sur les cours à court terme.

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of EMA, OBV and ROC with ATR risk management minimizes false signals while providing a robust trend following strategy for WIFUSDC 5m time frame.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] Potential weaknesses of this strategy are lack of consideration for market conditions and potential overfitting. If results are poor, I would try to add more filters or different indicators based on current market conditions; if they're mediocre in terms of Sharpe ratio, I might look at tweaking parameters such as EMA periods.
[Backup plan] In case the current strategy fails, I could consider incorporating other technical indicators, like moving averages or RSI, and also use machine learning models to adapt to different market environments. Additionally, it may be worth looking into risk management techniques such as diversification of assets in the portfolio.

iterations.hypothesis: Using Bollinger bands, RSI and ATR together with an entry rule based on the breakout of a Bollinger band upper and RSI over 50 along with ADX above 25 can help filter noise in ranging markets while capturing trending moves.
The combination of EMA(10), OBV and ROC with ATR based risk management reduces false signals in ranging markets while capturing trending movements.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.
The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR provides a better trade signal in the short term due to their ability to capture trending moves and volatility changes.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This strategy uses technical indicators such as RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR to generate trade signals. The hypothesis is that these indicators can capture trending moves and volatility changes more effectively than just using a single momentum indicator. If the results are poor, I would first check if there were any issues with data collection or entry/exit criteria. I might also try changing the parameters of the strategy such as adjusting the length of the moving averages used in the RSI calculation to see if that improves performance. Finally, an alternative approach could be to use a different set of technical indicators or to combine this strategy with other trading methods.
